changeSet.author: assistant
changeSet.comment: Create repeat_instance table used by ETL
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS repeat_instance ( id varchar(26) PRIMARY KEY, submission_id varchar(50) NOT NULL, repeat_path varchar(3000) NOT NULL, repeat_index bigint, client_updated_at timestamp, deleted_at timestamp, created_date timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), last_modified_date timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by varchar(100), last_modified_by varchar(100) );
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_repeat_instance_submission_path ON repeat_instance(submission_id, repeat_path);
changeSet.rollback: DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_repeat_instance_submission_path; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS repeat_instance;

changeSet.author: assistant
changeSet.comment: Create element_data_value and unique index used by the ETL
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS element_data_value ( id bigserial PRIMARY KEY, submission_id varchar(50) NOT NULL, repeat_instance_id varchar(26), element_id varchar(200) NOT NULL, option_id varchar(100), value_text text, value_num numeric, value_bool boolean, assignment_id varchar(50), template_id varchar(50) NOT NULL, category_id varchar(200), deleted_at timestamp, created_date timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), last_modified_date timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), repeat_instance_key text GENERATED ALWAYS AS (COALESCE(repeat_instance_id, '')) STORED, selection_key text GENERATED ALWAYS AS (COALESCE(option_id, '')) STORED, row_type char(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'S' );
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS ux_element_value_unique ON element_data_value ( submission_id, element_id, repeat_instance_key, row_type, selection_key );
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_element_data_value_submission_repeat ON element_data_value(submission_id, repeat_instance_id);
